title: Prepared statements does not work with multi-value indexes
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE Bug(id UInt64, data Array(String) NOT NULL) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE AnotherBug(id UInt32, bug_id UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT * FROM Bug WHERE has(data, '123') AND exists(SELECT 1 FROM AnotherBug WHERE bug_id = Bug.id);
key_bug_features: Prepared statement with multi-value index returns empty result
